creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This should be addressed by existing patches in the existing ports. 
I am not sure why this did not appear to work for you, but not a 
single other user has reported this, nor the FreeBSD.og cluster nor 
any of my tests, so I am going ahead and close this. 

If you still can reproduce it, you may need to investigate what's 
behind it.  Something unusual with the system in question I assume.
